author: PlayStation
text:
Mirth Island - Announcement Trailer | PS5 Games
https://store.playstation.com/en-us/concept/10019038

Welcome to Mirth Island, a heartwarming adventure about resilience, personal growth, and community.

Join Dodo after his acting career falls apart and he returns to his hometown heartbroken. When he discovers that the beloved community theater where his passion first began is now in ruins, Dodo sets out to help his childhood friend Rita rebuild it.

Explore the cute little world of Mirth Island, meet new friends, help the island’s residents, play wholesome mini-games, sing, dance, and work together to prepare for the grand performance.

#ps5 #ps5games

author: PlayStation
text:
World of Tanks: Heat - Release Date Announcement Trailer | PS5 Games
It’s official: World of Tanks: HEAT launches on PlayStation 5 on May 26, 2026! 

Wishlist now.

#ps5 #ps5games #worldofthanks #wotheat

author: PlayStation
text:
Every Detail Matters | PS5 Pro
Learn more about PS5 Pro: https://www.playstation.com/ps5/ps5-pro/ 

PS5 Pro, play PS5 games with the most impressive visuals ever possible on a PlayStation console.
 
With PlayStation 5 Pro, Every Detail Matters - thanks to features like advanced ray tracing, super sharp image clarity, and optimised console performance.
 
#ps5 #ps5pro

author: PlayStation
text:
R-Type Dimensions III - Launch Trailer | PS5 Games
https://store.playstation.com/concept/10017945

A ground-up remake of the classic R-Type III: The Third Lightning, modernized with upgraded visuals and gameplay while preserving its brutal, iconic design. A definitive revival of a 16-bit shooter masterpiece. Out now! Let the mission begin! 

#ps5 #ps5games

author: PlayStation
text:
Darksiders Warmastered Edition - PS5 Release Trailer | PS5 & PS4 Games
https://store.playstation.com/product/UP4389-CUSA05347_00-DARKSIDERSDENA01/

Darksiders Warmastered Edition is NOW AVAILABLE on PlayStation 5!

The game follows War, one of the Four Horsemen of the Apocalypse, as he is wrongly accused of triggering the end of the world and sets out on a quest for redemption.

The Warmastered Edition brings the acclaimed action-adventure classic back with enhanced visuals, improved performance, and all previously released content, delivering a definitive experience for modern platforms.

#ps5 #ps5games #ps4 #ps4games #Darksiders

Rated Mature

author: PlayStation
text:
Kusan: City of Wolves - Release Date Reveal | PS5 Games
https://store.playstation.com/product/UP4293-PPSA34584_00-0138298312276541

In this high-octane hardcore top-down shooter you must smash, slash and shoot your way through a brutal urban jungle ruled by gunfire and corruption to save Haru — a girl fitted with a city-grade atomic weapon.

Release Date: 30 July 2026

You play as Jin, a skilled ex-soldier turned gun-for-hire, living in the heart of a city where the line between predator and prey has already been crossed. This isn’t just another job though, a mysterious girl with immense but uncontrollable power is linked to a violent conspiracy that threatens to shift the balance of power. As chaos erupts, Jin must save the girl, confront his past and the betrayal of a commander he once trusted without question.

Everyone in Kusan wants something and nobody plays fair.

For Jin, there is only one way forward: flawless planning, ruthless execution and saving the girl from criminals while relying only on his wit and unrelenting will to survive the battlefield.

Expect fast, unforgiving combat where one mistake means death. Master sharp gunplay, perfect your movement, and chain brutal combos using the Quantum Knife and War Hand. Smash the environment to uncover Bolts, then spend them on upgrades that change how you fight and how you survive.

Every moment is intensified by an adrenaline fuelled soundtrack from Loptimist, a heavyweight in Korean hip hop, packed with head bopping loops and deep 808s that push you forward without mercy.

🔥 Play the demo now
Get a focused slice of the full game and tell us what you think.

🎮 Demo available now on PlayStation 5
https://store.playstation.com/product/UP4293-PPSA34584_00-0138298312276541

⭐ Wishlist on PlayStation 5: Kusan: City of Wolves 

Developer: CIRCLEfromDOT
Captured on a work in progress build.

#ps5 #ps5games 

Rated Mature
